what: Class for Port Backtest Config — port_backtest_config-class
title: Class for Port Backtest Config — port_backtest_config-class
text: S4 class specifying parameters backtesting stock-level portfolios.

title: Class for Port Backtest Config — port_backtest_config-class
text: chosen_score_metric_and_position character string representing chosen score metric position. eligibility_quantile_range numeric vector length 2 representing quantile range stock selection. min_eligible_assets_fallback numeric value representing minimum number eligible assets. chosen_scaler character string representing chosen scaler method. scaler_shrinkage numeric value representing scaler shrinkage parameter. use_raw_for_eligibility Logical; TRUE, uses raw scores eligibility instead scaled scores. enable_group_representativeness Logical; TRUE, ensures least one asset groups groups_m_d_ref selected_benchmark character string representing selected benchmark. initial_buffer_period numeric value representing initial buffer period. rebalancing_months numeric value representing number months rebalancing. cov_est_method object class cov_est_method representing covariance estimation method relevant parameters. Current methods : 'sample', 'ewma', 'cc' (constant correlation), 'pca1', 'pca2', 'shrink_id' (shrinkage identity matrix), 'shrink_cc' (shrinkage constant correlation). relevant covariance-based methods 'rp', 'hrp', 'mvo' 'mmaf'. port_construction_method character string representing type portfolio. Must one 'ew', 'sw', 'cw', 'cs', 'rp', 'hrp', 'mvo' 'mmaf' ('custom_weights' supported config). signal portfolios, 'cw' 'cs' applicable. signal portfolios, inferred based sb_algorithm. mvo_parameters object class mvo_parameters representing parameters mean-variance optimization. relevant 'mvo'. rp_parameters object class rp_parameters representing parameters risk parity. relevant 'rp'. hrp_parameters object class hrp_parameters representing parameters hierarchical risk parity. relevant 'hrp'. mmaf_parameters object class mmaf_parameters representing parameters MMAF method. relevant 'mmaf'. main_liquidity_metric character string indicating variables liquidity_m_df ultimately used. liquidity_floor_cutoffs Mandatory turnover_constraint_policy /liquidity_constraint_policy provided. data.frame containing liquidity_classification column liquidity metrics define cutoff values classify stocks according liquidity. liquidity_classification must named according 5 following liquidity classifications: ("micro_caps", "small_caps", "mid_caps", "large_caps" "mega_caps) numeric column indicate minimum acceptable values (adjusted inflation) stocks classification. Classification ascending order (least liquid liquid) metrics. set decimals, values interpreted quantiles classification set accordingly. Stocks liquidity lower micro_caps receive nano_caps classification. liquidity_constraint_policy policy handle liquidity constraints. relevant stocks. Possible elements : liquidity_floor_rule: character indicating liquidity classification (e.g., micro_caps, small_caps) used filter stocks. Stocks less liquidity specified liquidity_floor_rule considered ineligible. case generate_box_constraints function, liquidity_constraint_policy can also contain: liquidity_cap_rules: named vector one many elements used create upper bounds weights based liquidity classification. element's name corresponding value represents, respectively: liquidity_classification: character classification cap. liquidity_cap: numeric value indicating cap (upper bound) stocks liquidity classification. Many liquidity caps might created. turnover_constraint_policy policy handle turnover constraints. relevant stocks. elements used build buffer zones apply turnover constraints. contain: quantile_range_buffer: numeric value indicating increase quantile eligibility (sides) range used buffer zones. turnover_cap_rules: named vector one many elements used create maximum absolute bounds weights relation old portfolio, based liquidity classification. element's name corresponding value represents, respectively: liquidity_classification: character classification cap. turnover_cap: numeric value indicating cap (lower upper bounds) stocks liquidity classification. Many turnover caps might created. Stocks less liquid specified buffer zone signal higher respective buffer quantile considered eligible, even meet liquidity_floor_rule. concentration_constraint_policy policy handle concentration constraints. constraint applicable either signal stock portfolios. contains four elements: benchmark: character vector describing benchmark used apply constraint. signal portfolios, possible options theme_ss theme_sb. stock portfolios, must correspondence benchmark_weights_m_df max_abs_active_individual_weight: maximum absolute individual active weights. max_abs_active_group_weight: maximum absolute sector/theme active weight used creating group constraints generate_sector_constraints. given sector eligible stock, one greatest signal automatically promoted. case signal portfolios, ss_backtest, signals highest alpha_t_values promoted enable_theme_representativeness TRUE. Note , context stocks, benchmark_weights_m_d_ref data frame must also supplied. transaction_costs_parameters object class transaction_costs_parameters containing parameters calculating direct indirect costs. config_name character string representing name configuration.

text: port_backtest_config object class port_backtest_config containing configuration parameters backtest. port_weights_m_df meta dataframe containing portfolio weights across different dates. transactions_log object class transactions_log containing transaction portfolio. port_costs_m_xts meta xts object containing portfolio costs (e.g., direct cost, market impact cost, total cost, turnover) indexed dates. port_metrics_m_xts meta xts object containing portfolio performance metrics (provided) indexed dates. port_returns_m_xts meta xts object containing portfolio returns (raw net returns) indexed dates. final_stock_port object class stock_port representing final stock portfolio. port_construction_method character string indicating portfolio construction method used (e.g., "ew", "sw", "rp", "mvo", "custom_weights"). stock_universe_m_df meta dataframe containing stock universe derived backtest. final_stock_universe_m_d_ref meta dataframe containing last stock universe. port_stats_m_df meta dataframe containing portfolio statistics across different dates. final_port_stats_m_d_ref meta dataframe containing final portfolio statistics. port_backtest_workflow list detailing portfolio backtest workflow, including parameters, rebalancing dates, metadata. backtest_identifier character string representing backtest identifier. update logical indicating whether backtest results update original backtest.

title: Prepare inputs for a hierarchical model. — prepare_hierarchical_model_inputs
text: selected_backtest_returns_corrected_positions_m_xts_upd_ref xts containing backtest returns data various signals. first column include dates. Remaining columns represent signals (e.g., tickers) respective active returns. selected_market_factor_proxy_m_xts_upd_ref xts containing benchmark returns data. selected_signal_themes_m_d_ref data frame containing metadata signals. data frame include: tickers: Signal identifiers matching selected_backtest_returns_corrected_positions_m_xts_upd_ref. theme: Group membership signal, defining clusters Bayesian hierarchical model. dates: Dates corresponding backtest data. input ensures proper alignment signals associated themes. selected_backtest_returns_corrected_positions_m_upd_ref already processed selected_backtest_returns_corrected_positions_m_xts_upd_ref. data.frame already long format contemplates selected_market_factor_proxy_m_xts_upd_ref selected_signal_themes_m_d_ref theme data. model_spec_theme_level character string specifying desired Bayesian model structure. Options include: "random_intercept_fixed_slope": Includes random effects intercept theme level. "theme_specific_intercept_fixed_slope": Uses fixed intercepts theme. "theme_specific_intercept_theme_specific_slope": Includes fixed intercepts slopes theme. "fixed_intercept_fixed_slope": Omits theme-level intercepts includes random effects theme:signal level.

Active Weights Constraint: Assets benchmark weights active weight threshold automatically included. what: 6. Portfolio Analytics, Transaction Costs and Delisting Realism
title: Run Portfolio Backtest — run_port_backtest
text: every rebalance engine computes rich set portfolio benchmark analytics (via calculate_port_stats) micro (per-asset) macro (group/sector) levels: concentration (HHI, effective N, entropy, Gini, top-k), diversification ratio, weighted-average pairwise correlation, gross/net exposure, relative risk-contribution measures (RRC HHI, effective N, distance--ERC) — plus active (act_, information-ratio) variants whenever benchmark supplied. Trading modelled realistically: allocate_port sizes trade orders applies market-impact cost model (calculate_transaction_costs, static "dynamic" lambda) top direct costs, keeps full transaction log. Delisted newly listed (IPO) names handled explicitly rolling rebalancing — delisted holdings unwound (zero target weight, imputed liquidity/volatility), IPOs enter zero weight, surviving names carried forward roll_port.

title: Run Signal Blending Backtest — run_sb_backtest
text: Executes time-series cross-validation procedure, refitting specified rebalancing months. data divided : Training window (fixed size, expanding rolling) Optional validation window (tuning) Testing window (evaluated sequentially rebalancing date) Key steps: Signal selection based is_eligible flags signal_universe_m_df. Correction signal orientation (e.g., multiply -1 low_ prefixed). Optionally override signal selection via custom weights. Hyperparameter tuning via: grid_search random_search (distribution sampling) bayesian_opt (ParBayesianOptimization) Refit predict using ML algorithm (OLS, glmnet, xgboost, rf, nn, etc.). Global Surrogate Model (gsm_algorithm) fitted post-hoc interpretability. Walk-forward --sample testing metric computation.

Signal Engineering Benchmarks (SE Benchmarks) evaluate performance steps: Signal Selection Benchmark: Built using universe signals chosen_signals. evaluates performance signal selection process. title: sb_backtest_config Class — sb_backtest_config-class
text: sb_backtest_config class designed define end--end signal-blending (heuristic machine learning) experiment, including hyperparameter tuning strategy, algorithm parameters, experiment-specific configurations.

title: sb_backtest_config Class — sb_backtest_config-class
text: sb_algorithm Character string specifying signal-blending algorithm. One ew (Equal Weight), sw (Signal Weighting), rp (Risk Parity), hrp (Hierarchical Risk Parity), mvo (Mean-Variance Optimization), mmaf (Micro-Macro Allocation Framework), custom_weights, ols (Ordinary Least Squares), glmnet (Elastic Net), rf (Random Forest), xgb (eXtreme Gradient Boosting), nn (Keras Neural Network). target_fwd_name Name target variable target_m_df. tuning_strategy object class tuning_strategy, specifying strategy tuning hyperparameters. chosen_signals_and_positions character vector indicating signals include backtest positions (long short). split_method Character string indicating data splitting method ('expanding' 'rolling'). training_sample_size Number observations include training sample. rebalancing_months Months (numeric) model rebalanced (refit). custom_objective Character string specifying objective. ML algorithms: one 'squared_error', 'pseudo_huber_error', 'absolute_error' (twice-differentiable loss; non-'squared_error' choices apply 'xgb'/'nn'). heuristic portfolio algorithms ('sw', 'rp', 'hrp', 'mvo', 'mmaf'): 'max_'/'min_' prefix + heuristic performance metric present signal_universe_m_df (see display_valid_custom_objectives()). May NULL. keras_architecture_parameters object class keras_architecture_parameters NULL, providing parameters specific keras-based neural networks. includes: units: numeric vector specifying number neurons layer. n_layers: integer indicating total number layers neural network. activation: character vector listing activation functions layer (e.g., "relu", "sigmoid", "tanh"). nn_optimizer: character string specifying optimizer used training model (options: "Adam" "RMSProp"). batch_norm_option: logical vector indicating whether batch normalization applied respective layer (TRUE FALSE). signal_port_parameters object class signal_port_parameters, specifying parameters constructing signal portfolios (portfolio-blending). quantile_tau single numeric value indicating tau parameter used quantile regression, 0 1. huber_delta single positive numeric value indicating boundary separates loss function turns quadratic linear. config_name character string identify configuration.

title: sb_backtest_config Class — sb_backtest_config-class
text: sb_algorithm must one 12 supported algorithms. chosen_signals_and_positions must "" named vector "long"/"short". tuning_strategy required ML algorithms forbidden ols/heuristic algorithms; hyperparameter names must match algorithm. early_stop xgb/nn; keras_architecture_parameters nn; signal_port_parameters rp/hrp/mvo/mmaf. split_method must "expanding"; rebalancing_months 1–12; quantile_tau (0,1); huber_delta > 0.

Elements : "micro_caps", "small_caps", "mid_caps", "large_caps" "mega_caps" Classification ascending order (lest liquid liquid) metrics. set decimals, values interpreted quantiles classification set according quantiles first column named "liquidity_classification" 5 rows duplicates NAs. liquidity_floor_rule Optional. Character string specifying liquidity classification apply liquidity floor rule (eg. "nano_caps", "micro_caps", "small_caps", "mid_caps", "large_caps", "mega_caps"). ... Additional arguments passed method. verbose Logical. TRUE, prints additional information processing.

title: Select and Correct Signal Positions — select_and_correct_signals

what: Build the Evaluation Function for Hyperparameter Tuning — set_eval_function
title: Build the Evaluation Function for Hyperparameter Tuning — set_eval_function
text: Factory returning closure hyper_tune uses score one hyperparameter candidate given ML algorithm. shape returned function depends tuning_method, grid/random search Bayesian optimization consume differently.

title: Build the Evaluation Function for Hyperparameter Tuning — set_eval_function
code: set_eval_function(ml_algorithm, tuning_method)

title: Build the Evaluation Function for Hyperparameter Tuning — set_eval_function
text: ml_algorithm Character, algorithm build evaluator ("glmnet", "rf", "xgb", "nn"). tuning_method Character, one "grid_search", "random_search", "bayesian_opt"; selects calling convention.

title: Build the Evaluation Function for Hyperparameter Tuning — set_eval_function
text: closure passed hyper_tune: direct evaluator grid/random search, data-capturing wrapper Bayesian optimization.

title: Build the Evaluation Function for Hyperparameter Tuning — set_eval_function
text: "grid_search" / "random_search": returns function whose formals hyperparameters (plus data eval-metric arguments), suitable purrr::pmap() / furrr::future_pmap() expanded grid. fits training sample, predicts validation sample, returns calculate_eval_metrics data frame (fitted model return_all_info = TRUE). "bayesian_opt": returns wrapper captures data / eval-metric arguments via ..., exposes inner fit() taking hyperparameters returning named list scalar scores expected ParBayesianOptimization::bayesOpt(). Supported algorithms: "glmnet" (glmnet::glmnet), "rf" (ranger::ranger; mtry treated proportion predictors), "xgb" (xgboost::xgb.train), "nn" (fit_keras_model).

title: Set Portfolio Weights — set_portfolio_weights
text: function assigns weights portfolio based specified portfolio construction method. supports various methods including equal weighting, signal weighting, capitalization weighting, capitalization scaling, risk parity, mean-tracking error optimization. function also accommodates additional constraints policies related liquidity, turnover, benchmark weights.

title: Set Portfolio Weights — set_portfolio_weights
code: set_portfolio_weights(   universe_m_d_ref,   port_construction_method,   liquidity_m_d_ref = NULL,   cap_weighting_metric = NULL,   groups_m_d_ref = NULL,   covariance_matrix = NULL,   eligible_returns_m_xts_upd_ref = NULL,   selected_benchmark_m_xts_upd_ref = NULL,   active_returns = if (is.null(selected_benchmark_m_xts_upd_ref)) FALSE else TRUE,   cov_estimation_method = "sample",   cov_matrix_sample_size = if (is.null(eligible_returns_m_xts_upd_ref)) NULL else     nrow(eligible_returns_m_xts_upd_ref),   liquidity_constraint_policy = NULL,   turnover_constraint_policy = NULL,   concentration_constraint_policy = NULL,   n_random_ports = 2000,   random_ports_method = "sample",   opt_objective = "sharpe",   opt_method = "random",   ridge_pen = NULL,   n_resamples = 0,   exp_ret_score_jitter = 0,   cov_eigval_jitter = 0,   rp_method = "cyclical-spinu",   exp_ret_score_tilt = NULL,   exp_ret_score_tilt_eta = NULL,   linkage = "single",   custom_weights_m_d_ref = NULL,   mmaf_method = "bottom_up",   top_down_proxy_port_method,   mmaf_group_col,   micro_port_construction_method = NULL,   macro_port_construction_method = NULL,   macro_concentration_constraint_policy = NULL,   macro_cap_weighting_metric = NULL,   macro_n_random_ports = 2000,   macro_random_ports_method = "sample",   macro_opt_objective = "sharpe",   macro_opt_method = "random",   macro_ridge_pen = NULL,   macro_n_resamples = 0,   macro_exp_ret_score_jitter = 0,   macro_cov_eigval_jitter = 0,   macro_rp_method = "cyclical-spinu",   macro_exp_ret_score_tilt = NULL,   macro_exp_ret_score_tilt_eta = NULL,   macro_linkage = "single",   selected_benchmark = NULL,   bench_assets_returns_m_xts_upd_ref = NULL,   level = "port",   lower_quantile_winsorization = 0.025,   upper_quantile_winsorization = 0.975,   parallel = FALSE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Set Portfolio Weights — set_portfolio_weights
text: universe_m_d_ref data frame containing current universe signals, including associated metrics. structure data frame depends portfolio construction method used. port_construction_method character string indicating method use portfolio construction. Supported methods : ew Equal-Weighted Portfolio sw Signal-Weighted Portfolio cw Cap-Weighted Portfolio cs Cap-Scaled Portfolio rp Risk-Parity Portfolio hrp Hierarchical Risk-Parity Portfolio mvo Mean-Variance (resampled) Optimization mmaf Micro-Macro Allocation Framework Portfolio custom_weights User-supplied weights, via custom_weights_m_d_ref liquidity_m_d_ref optional data frame matrix containing liquidity metrics signals, used capitalization weighting scaling. Defaults NULL. cap_weighting_metric optional character string specifying metric use capitalization weighting scaling. Defaults NULL. groups_m_d_ref optional data frame used group constraints covariance matrix estimation. include group information used. Defaults NULL. covariance_matrix optional covariance matrix eligible tickers. NULL, function estimate covariance matrix using provided return data. Defaults NULL. eligible_returns_m_xts_upd_ref optional xts object containing return data eligible tickers, used covariance matrix estimation Risk-Parity MVO methods. selected_benchmark_m_xts_upd_ref optional xts object containing benchmark returns used compute active returns (active_returns = TRUE). active_returns Logical. TRUE, covariance estimation use active returns (asset returns minus benchmark). Defaults FALSE selected_benchmark_m_xts_upd_ref NULL, otherwise TRUE. cov_estimation_method optional character string specifying method estimating covariance matrix. Defaults NULL. cov_matrix_sample_size Integer. Number time periods (rows eligible_returns_m_xts_upd_ref) used estimate covariance matrix. NULL, uses available observations. liquidity_constraint_policy optional list specifying policy liquidity constraints. Defaults NULL. turnover_constraint_policy optional list specifying policy turnover constraints. Defaults NULL. concentration_constraint_policy Optional list specifying concentration constraints MVO optimization. Typically includes max_abs_active_individual_weight individual/sector limits. n_random_ports optional numeric value indicating number random portfolios generate optimization methods. Defaults NULL. random_ports_method optional character string specifying method risk parity optimization. Defaults NULL. opt_objective Objective mean-tracking error optimization. Defaults NULL. opt_method Character. Optimization method MVO. Defaults "random" can include methods like "grid", "bayesian", "differential_evolution". ridge_pen Numeric. Ridge penalty MVO optimization improve numerical stability. Defaults NULL. n_resamples Number resamples resampled MVO. Defaults 0. exp_ret_score_jitter Numeric. Standard deviation jitter added expected return scores resampling. Defaults 0. cov_eigval_jitter Numeric. Standard deviation jitter added covariance matrix eigenvalues resampling. Defaults 0. rp_method Character. Method compute Risk Parity portfolio. Defaults "cyclical-spinu". exp_ret_score_tilt Character argument specififying whether tilt must applied risk-parity weights exp_ret_score_tilt_eta Numeric. intensity tilt effect using exp_ret_score_tilt. Higher values increase tilt effect. linkage Character. Linkage method hierarchical clustering Risk Parity. Defaults "single". custom_weights_m_d_ref meta dataframe containing custom user-defined weights. Required port_construction_method = "custom_weights". Must contain columns tickers, dates, weights. mmaf_method Character. Method Micro-Macro Allocation Framework. Options "bottom_up" "top_down". Defaults "bottom_up". top_down_proxy_port_method Character. Method constructing top-proxy portfolio MMAF. Options "ew", "sw", "cw", "cs", "rp", "mvo". mmaf_group_col Character. Column name groups_m_d_ref used define groups MMAF. micro_port_construction_method Character micro method used allocate within groups (e.g., "ew", "rp", "hrp", "mvo"). macro_port_construction_method Character macro method used allocate across groups (e.g., "ew", "rp", "hrp", "mvo"). strictly neutral top-sector allocation, prefer "ew", "rp" "hrp" keep macro_exp_ret_score_tilt = NULL. macro_concentration_constraint_policy Optional list group-level weight caps. macro_cap_weighting_metric Optional character cap-based macro weighting (used). macro_n_random_ports Integer, number random portfolios macro level. macro_random_ports_method Character, sampling method (macro). macro_opt_objective Character, optimization objective macro. macro_opt_method Character, optimizer selector macro. macro_ridge_pen Numeric NULL, ridge penalty macro MVO. macro_n_resamples Integer, number resamples macro MVO. macro_exp_ret_score_jitter Numeric, jitter sector ER (macro MVO). macro_cov_eigval_jitter Numeric, jitter macro covariance eigenvalues. macro_rp_method Character, risk parity method macro. macro_exp_ret_score_tilt Optional numeric vector/column name RP tilt (macro). macro_exp_ret_score_tilt_eta Optional numeric, tilt intensity macro RP. macro_linkage Character, passed macro hierarchical methods applicable. selected_benchmark controls whether 'port' object benchmark created added portolio results. bench_assets_returns_m_xts_upd_ref Optional. 'xts' object containing returns stocks. Needed computing benchmark port stats. level Character. Level portfolio object. Options "port", "benchmark", "group". Defaults "port". Helps assessing type portfolio created. lower_quantile_winsorization optional numeric value lower quantile winsorization handling cap weighting scaling. Defaults NULL. upper_quantile_winsorization optional numeric value upper quantile winsorization handling cap weighting scaling. Defaults NULL. parallel Logical. TRUE, enables parallel processing computationally intensive tasks. Defaults FALSE. verbose Logical. TRUE, prints progress messages.

title: Set Top-Down Micro Weights — set_top_down_micro_weights
text: group_name Character. Name group processed. group_weights Named numeric vector group weights. Required constraint ridge penalty defined. micro_port_construction_method Character. Method used portfolio construction within group (e.g., "mvo", "risk_parity"). group_members List mapping group names member tickers. universe_m_d_ref Data frame stock-level reference data, including tickers optional benchmark/target weights. liquidity_m_d_ref (Optional) Data frame liquidity metrics full universe. eligible_returns_m_xts_upd_ref optional xts object containing return data eligible tickers, used covariance matrix estimation Risk-Parity MVO methods. selected_benchmark_m_xts_upd_ref optional xts object containing benchmark returns used compute active returns (active_returns = TRUE). active_returns Logical. TRUE, covariance estimation use active returns (asset returns minus benchmark). Defaults FALSE selected_benchmark_m_xts_upd_ref NULL, otherwise TRUE. cov_estimation_method optional character string specifying method estimating covariance matrix. Defaults NULL. cov_matrix_sample_size Integer. Number time periods (rows eligible_returns_m_xts_upd_ref) used estimate covariance matrix. NULL, uses available observations. groups_m_d_ref optional data frame used group constraints covariance matrix estimation. include group information used. Defaults NULL. selected_benchmark controls whether 'port' object benchmark created added portolio results. bench_assets_returns_m_xts_upd_ref Optional. 'xts' object containing returns stocks. Needed computing benchmark port stats. concentration_constraint_policy (Optional) Policy object controlling max active weights stock level. turnover_constraint_policy (Optional) Policy object controlling stock group-level turnover caps. liquidity_constraint_policy (Optional) Policy object controlling stock group-level liquidity caps. cap_weighting_metric (Optional) Market cap related metric cap-weighted allocations. rp_method (Optional) Risk parity method. exp_ret_score_tilt (Optional) Expected return tilt applied risk parity. exp_ret_score_tilt_eta (Optional) Tilt intensity expected return tilt. linkage (Optional) Linkage method hierarchical clustering risk parity. n_random_ports (Optional) Number random portfolios used resampling. random_ports_method (Optional) Sampling method random portfolios. opt_objective (Optional) Optimization objective (e.g., "min_var", "sharpe"). opt_method (Optional) Numerical optimization routine. ridge_pen (Optional) Ridge penalty term regularized optimization. n_resamples (Optional) Number resamples used MVO. exp_ret_score_jitter (Optional) Jitter applied expected return scores. cov_eigval_jitter (Optional) Jitter applied covariance eigenvalues. lower_quantile_winsorization (Optional) Lower quantile cutoff. upper_quantile_winsorization (Optional) Upper quantile cutoff.

title: Signal Portfolio Parameters — signal_port_parameters-class

title: Signal Portfolio Parameters — signal_port_parameters-class
text: cov_est_method object class cov_est_method representing covariance estimation method relevant parameters. Current methods : 'sample', 'ewma', 'cc' (constant correlation), 'pca1', 'pca2', 'shrink_id' (shrinkage identity matrix), 'shrink_cc' (shrinkage constant correlation). relevant 'rp' 'mvo'. mvo_parameters object class mvo_parameters representing parameters mean-variance optimization. relevant 'mvo'. rp_parameters object class rp_parameters representing parameters risk parity. relevant 'rp'. hrp_parameters object class hrp_parameters representing parameters hierarchical risk parity. relevant 'hrp'. mmaf_parameters object class mmaf_parameters representing parameters MMAF portfolio construction method. relevant 'mmaf'. concentration_constraint_policy policy handle concentration constraints. contains three elements: benchmark: character vector describing benchmark used apply constraint. signal portfolios, possible options theme_ss theme_sb. stock portfolios, must correspondence benchmark_weights_m_df max_abs_active_individual_weight: maximum absolute individual active weights. max_abs_active_group_weight: maximum absolute theme active weight used creating group constraints.

text: numeric vector length vector transformed values.

title: Signal Transformation Function — signal_transform
text: function first applies winsorization vector based provided quantile thresholds. Values exceeding upper quantile replaced upper quantile value, values lower quantile replaced lower quantile value. function computes z-scores winsorized values. Finally, transforms z-scores: Positive z-scores adjusted \(1 + Z\) Negative z-scores transformed \(\frac{1}{1 - Z}\) z-score zero transformed 1#'

title: signal_universe_m_df-class — signal_universe_m_df-class
text: signal_universe_m_df stores performance summaries set signals (row = one signal/strategy). inverts usual meta_dataframe layout: instead row stock-date observation columns signals/features, row signal/strategy columns performance metrics attributes (e.g. IR, alpha, p_value, theme, is_eligible). object canonical input/output functions summarize, rank select signals backtests (example summarize_performance(), selection heuristics, meta-model training).

title: signal_universe_m_df-class — signal_universe_m_df-class
text: S4 subclass meta_dataframe represents universe backtested signals (strategies). parent-class structural rules still apply: data must data.frame whose first three columns id, tickers, dates (tickers typically stores signal identifier strategy name, dates represents evaluation date performance metrics). id column expected paste0(tickers, "-", dates) objects remain compatible rest package. Typical performance columns: IR, alpha, alpha_se, p_value, turnover, theme, benchmark_return, etc. Eligibility-related columns: pre_eligible_signals — logical (integer 0/1) indicating whether signal passed initial, signal-level filters (data sufficiency, minimum history, etc.). is_eligible — logical indicating final eligibility selection signal-selection pipelines (rules, thresholds, cross-signal constraints applied). eligibility_reason (optional) — character describing signal excluded (present). Use summarize_performance() (package helper builds signal universes) construct valid objects; low-level creation must still respect meta_dataframe validation (id/tickers/dates ordering, types, uniqueness).

title: signal_universe_m_df-class — signal_universe_m_df-class
text: data data.frame row backtested signal/strategy columns performance metrics, attributes eligibility flags. ss_backtest_workflow : signal-selection backtest workflow metadata attached universe (may NULL). workflow Inherited: history steps produced signal-universe (e.g. backtest parameters, resampling choices). signals Inherited: typically identifies columns treat signal identifiers metrics interest. unique_dates Inherited: number distinct dates. unique_tickers Inherited: number distinct signal identifiers. n_obs Inherited: total number rows (signals). current_date Inherited: reference/current date object. meta_dataframe_name Inherited: short identifier object.

title: signal_universe_m_df-class — signal_universe_m_df-class
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ df <- data.frame(   id = c("earnings_yield-2026-07-01", "free_cash_flow_yield-2026-07-01"),   tickers = c("earnings_yield", "free_cash_flow_yield"), # here: signal names   dates = as.Date(c("2026-07-01", "2026-07-01")),   IR = c(1.2, 0.8),   alpha = c(0.015, 0.008),   p_value = c(0.02, 0.10),   theme = c("Value", "Value"),   pre_eligible_signals = c(TRUE, TRUE),   is_eligible = c(TRUE, FALSE),   stringsAsFactors = FALSE )  su <- new(   "signal_universe_m_df",   data = df,   workflow = list(step = "summarize_performance()"),   signals = c("earnings_yield","free_cash_flow_yield"),   unique_dates = length(unique(df$dates)),   unique_tickers = length(unique(df$tickers)),   n_obs = nrow(df),   current_date = Sys.Date(),   meta_dataframe_name = "signal_universe_example" ) } # }

title: signals_m_df-class — signals_m_df-class
text: signals_m_df inherits meta_dataframe tightens validation modelling: underlying data must contain missing values (NA column). ensures downstream modelling functions (run_* family) receive complete data.

title: signals_m_df-class — signals_m_df-class

ss_backtest_config Class — ss_backtest_config-class
text: ss_backtest_config class designed define end--end signal selection experiment based backtest returns associated strategies. class includes parameters manipulating backtest returns object conducting hypothesis tests regarding CAPM alpha multiple testing framework, frequentist bayesian approaches. latter, hierarhical model fit, informative priors set according exogeneous dataset user, default uninformative priors.

title: ss_backtest_config Class — ss_backtest_config-class
text: chosen_signals_and_positions character indicating signals ss_backtest applied positions (long short). example, chosen_signals_and_positions = c(book_yield = "long", vol_36m = "short"). initial_sample_size numeric indicating minimum number observations required begin backtest. rebalancing_months numeric indicating number months rebalancing periods. active_returns logical indicating whether use active returns (TRUE) total returns (FALSE) backtest. split_method method used splitting data, either "expanding" "rolling" (default "expanding"). alpha_test_strategy alpha_test_strategy object configuration alpha test. config_name character string representing name configuration.

what: S4 Class for Signal Selection Backtest Results — ss_backtest_results-class

title: S4 Class for Signal Selection Backtest Results — ss_backtest_results-class
text: S4 object class ss_backtest_results.

title: S4 Class for Signal Selection Backtest Results — ss_backtest_results-class
text: ss_backtest_config object class ss_backtest_config containing configuration backtest. signal_universe_m_df meta dataframe containing signal universes rebalancing period. final_signal_universe_m_d_ref meta dataframe containing last signal universe. selected_market_factor_proxy_m_xts meta_xts object containing selected market factor proxy. frequentist_results list frequentist model fit results bayesian_results list Bayesian model fit results p_correction_method character string indicating p-value correction method used. ss_backtest_workflow list describing signal selection backtest workflow, including parameters metadata. backtest_identifier character string representing backtest identifier. update logical indicating whether backtest results updated.

what: Add step_impute_sector to a Recipe — step_impute_sector
title: Add step_impute_sector to a Recipe — step_impute_sector
text: Adds step_impute_sector step recipe. step imputes missing values group-wise, replacing NAs selected columns sector-level mean median. imputation values estimated prep() (per sector) applied bake().

text: recipe recipe object. ... Additional arguments passed methods (used). sector character string specifying name sector variable. method character string specifying imputation method. Either "mean" "median". role role assign new variables created step. Default NA. trained logical indicating step trained. Default FALSE. impute_values list computed imputation values variable. skip logical indicating step skipped baking. Default FALSE. id character string step ID. Default random ID.

Typically "mean" "median". role character string describing role created variable (usually "predictor"). required recipes API. trained logical indicating whether preprocessing step trained. impute_values list named vectors storing imputed values computed training (one vector per group). skip logical. step skipped recipe baked recipes::bake()? Default FALSE. id character string used uniquely identify step. Automatically generated NULL.

title: stock_universe_m_df-class — stock_universe_m_df-class
text: stock_universe_m_df canonical container per-asset expected-return scores eligibility flags used portfolio construction backtesting helpers (e.g. derive_stock_universe_m_d_ref, select_universe, construct_portfolio). derives meta_dataframe-class carries additional metadata portfolio/backtest workflow.

title: stock_universe_m_df-class — stock_universe_m_df-class
text: S4 subclass meta_dataframe representing stock-level universe used portfolio construction. pre_eligible_assets indicates stocks pass initial asset-level filters portfolio rules applied. is_eligible logical indicating final eligibility portfolio inclusion. exp_ret_score numeric used rank weight assets; may derived --sample predictions chosen signal metrics optionally scaled scaler.

title: stock_universe_m_df-class — stock_universe_m_df-class
text: data data.frame (first three columns: id, tickers, dates). Must also include pre_eligible_assets, is_eligible, exp_ret_score. workflow . Record preprocessing / backtest workflow produced object. signals character. Names columns data represent signals / metrics. unique_dates numeric. Number distinct dates data. unique_tickers numeric. Number distinct tickers data. n_obs numeric. Total number observations (rows) data. current_date Date. Reference/current date object. meta_dataframe_name character. Short identifier meta_dataframe instance. port_backtest_workflow . Metadata describing portfolio/backtest parameters used build stock universe.

title: stock_universe_m_df-class — stock_universe_m_df-class
text: Objects must satisfy parent-class validation must include columns pre_eligible_assets, is_eligible, exp_ret_score. scaler used, exp_ret_score post-scaling score; raw signals/predictions used equals raw expected-return score. Typical construction via derive_stock_universe_m_d_ref() enforces additional checks (mutual exclusivity inputs, scaler/shrinkage semantics, winsorization).

title: Summarize Hierarchical CAPM Model (lmer) — summarize_lmer_model
text: Summarizes output hierarchical CAPM fitted using lme4::lmer(), extracting fixed random effects, computing relevant statistics (alphas, betas, p-values, t-stats, Treynor ratio, appraisal ratio), aggregating results according specified model structure (theme-level signal-level).

title: Summarize Hierarchical CAPM Model (lmer) — summarize_lmer_model
code: summarize_lmer_model(   lmer_model,   signal_universe_m_d_ref = NULL,   selected_signal_themes_m_d_ref,   model_spec_theme_level,   hierarchical_p_value_method )

title: Summarize Hierarchical CAPM Model (lmer) — summarize_lmer_model
text: lmer_model fitted lme4::lmer model object, typically estimating hierarchical CAPM across signals. signal_universe_m_d_ref (Optional) meta dataframe including signals consideration. argument currently used can included consistency future extension. selected_signal_themes_m_d_ref meta dataframe including signals passed eligibility filters, containing columns like tickers theme. Used join results determine final structure. model_spec_theme_level character string indicating hierarchical structure model. Must one : "random_intercept_fixed_slope": Random intercepts per theme, shared slope. "theme_specific_intercept_fixed_slope": Fixed intercepts per theme, shared slope. "theme_specific_intercept_theme_specific_slope": Fixed intercepts slopes per theme. "fixed_intercept_fixed_slope": grouping; simple fixed-effects model intercept slope. hierarchical_p_value_method character string indicating degrees freedom approximation method fixed-effect p-values. Must one : "Satterthwaite", "Kenward-Roger", "lme4" (skips approximation).

title: Summarize Hierarchical CAPM Model (lmer) — summarize_lmer_model
text: dataframe (pooled_CAPM_metrics_m_d_ref) per-signal CAPM metrics, including: individual_alpha, individual_beta: Total signal-specific alpha beta. theme_alpha, theme_beta: Theme-level alpha beta components. alpha_se, alpha_t_stat: Standard error t-statistic alpha. p_value: One-sided p-value alpha. specific_risk: Residual volatility (sigma). treynor_ratio, appraisal_ratio: Risk-adjusted performance measures.

title: Summarize Hierarchical CAPM Model (lmer) — summarize_lmer_model
text: function used decompose result mixed-effects CAPM models interpretable metrics. handles different model structures flexibly integrates fixed random effects appropriately.

what: Summarize Performance Metrics of Backtests — summarize_performance
title: Summarize Performance Metrics of Backtests — summarize_performance
text: Computes performance metrics set signal backtests using either simple (-pooled) linear CAPM models hierarchical mixed-effects CAPM models. output includes per-signal metrics alphas, betas, specific risk, t-statistics, p-values, Treynor ratios, appraisal ratios, adjusted active returns applicable.

title: Summarize Performance Metrics of Backtests — summarize_performance
code: summarize_performance(   selected_backtest_returns_corrected_positions_m_xts_upd_ref,   selected_market_factor_proxy_m_xts_upd_ref,   model_structure,   model_spec_theme_level,   lmer_control,   selected_signal_themes_m_d_ref,   custom_signal_universe_metrics_m_upd_ref = NULL,   active_returns = TRUE,   verbose = TRUE )

title: Summarize Performance Metrics of Backtests — summarize_performance
text: selected_backtest_returns_corrected_positions_m_xts_upd_ref xts object containing backtest returns signal (columns signal tickers, rows dates). selected_market_factor_proxy_m_xts_upd_ref xts object containing benchmark market factor returns. Used estimate systematic risk exposures (betas). model_structure character string indicating CAPM model structure. Must one : "no_pooled": Fits separate CAPM models per signal using OLS. "partial_pooled": Fits hierarchical CAPM model using lme4::lmer. model_spec_theme_level character string defining structure hierarchical CAPM. Must one : "random_intercept_fixed_slope" "theme_specific_intercept_fixed_slope" "theme_specific_intercept_theme_specific_slope" "fixed_intercept_fixed_slope" lmer_control named list control parameters lme4::lmer(). Valid entries include: lmer_optimizer: Optimizer used (e.g., "nloptwrap"). lmer_optimization_objective: "REML" "ML". hierarchical_p_value_method: Method p-value approximation; "Satterthwaite", "Kenward-Roger", "lme4". selected_signal_themes_m_d_ref dataframe describing signal membership themes. Must include: tickers: Signal identifiers matching return matrix. theme: Group (e.g., sector) membership signal. dates: Date signal activity. custom_signal_universe_metrics_m_upd_ref Optional dataframe additional signal-level metrics. recent available date used. must include: tickers, dates, id additional performance metrics append. active_returns Logical. TRUE, return series converted active returns (.e., excess returns benchmark) estimation. verbose Logical. TRUE, prints progress messages.

title: Summarize Performance Metrics of Backtests — summarize_performance
text: list two elements: signal_universe_m_d_ref meta dataframe enriched performance metrics including alphas, betas, t-statistics, risk-adjusted ratios, p-values. frequentist_fit_results_list list fitted model objects: "no_pooled": list lm models (one per signal). "partial_pooled": fitted lmer model.

what: Summarize Posterior Draws for Signal Universe — summarize_posteriors_draws
title: Summarize Posterior Draws for Signal Universe — summarize_posteriors_draws
text: function computes various posterior summary statistics given set signals, themes, posterior draws. updates signal_universe_m_d_ref data frame posterior statistics including alphas, betas, sigmas, metrics.

title: Summarize Posterior Draws for Signal Universe — summarize_posteriors_draws
code: summarize_posteriors_draws(   brm_model,   signal_universe_m_d_ref = NULL,   selected_signal_themes_m_d_ref,   model_spec_theme_level,   compute_predictives_full = FALSE,   n_draws_predictive = NULL )

title: Summarize Posterior Draws for Signal Universe — summarize_posteriors_draws
text: brm_model bayesian model fit brms::brm. signal_universe_m_d_ref Optional. performance-enriched signal universe summarize_performance() (id, tickers, dates, plus frequentist CAPM metric columns). NULL, function instead returns raw tidy posterior-draws objects (see @return). selected_signal_themes_m_d_ref (meta) data frame id, tickers ("signals") dates column contemplating signals signals_m_df "theme" column providing group membership signal, needed defining clusters bayesian hierarchical model. contain data current date. model_spec_theme_level character string specifying desired Bayesian model structure. Options include: "random_intercept_fixed_slope": Includes random effects intercept theme level. "theme_specific_intercept_fixed_slope": Uses fixed intercepts theme. "theme_specific_intercept_theme_specific_slope": Includes fixed intercepts slopes theme. "fixed_intercept_fixed_slope": Omits theme-level intercepts includes random effects theme:signal level. compute_predictives_full TRUE, computes full posterior predictive distribution. n_draws_predictive Number posterior draws use predictive computations. NULL, available draws used.

title: Summarize Posterior Draws for Signal Universe — summarize_posteriors_draws
text: named list. signal_universe_m_d_ref supplied: signal_universe_m_d_ref (input, left-joined posterior alpha/beta/sigma/Treynor/appraisal metrics) posterior_draws_summaries (list intercept_summary, slope_summary, sd_summary, epred_summary, predicted_summary data frames, median/89\ signal_universe_m_d_ref NULL: list raw tidy posterior-draws data frames (tidy_posterior_draws_intercept, tidy_posterior_draws_slope, tidy_posterior_draws_sd, tidy_posterior_epred_draws, tidy_posterior_predicted_draws).

title: Summarize Posterior Draws for Signal Universe — summarize_posteriors_draws
text: function performs following operations theme: Computes updates posterior overall alpha individual alpha signal. Computes updates probability (positive) direction posterior alphas. Computes updates posterior overall beta individual beta signal. Computes updates posterior sigma signal. Computes updates posterior metrics active return, tracking error, information ratio (IR). Computes updates additional performance metrics like Appraisal Ratio (AP) Treynor ratio.

code: update_tickers_catalog(old_tickers_catalog, new_tickers_catalog, ...)  # S4 method for class 'tickers_catalog,tickers_catalog' update_tickers_catalog(   old_tickers_catalog,   new_tickers_catalog,   ticker_changes = NULL )

title: Update a tickers_catalog Object — update_tickers_catalog
text: old_tickers_catalog tickers_catalog S4 object representing previously stored catalog (state last update). new_tickers_catalog tickers_catalog S4 object containing latest batch stock data. current_date must equal old_tickers_catalog@current_date plus one month, maximum tickers_last_quote must strictly greater old catalog's. ... Additional arguments (currently unused; reserved future methods). ticker_changes data.frame mapping tickers renamed old_tickers_catalog new_tickers_catalog, columns: new_tickers Character. new ticker symbol observed new_tickers_catalog. old_tickers Character. corresponding previous ticker symbol old_tickers_catalog. change_date Date. date ticker change occurred. Must contain NAs duplicated new_tickers/old_tickers. Defaults NULL, treated empty (zero-row) data.frame, .e. ticker changes updates. ticker newly observed new_tickers_catalog listed treated new IPO; ticker missing old_tickers_catalog's successor without matching entry triggers error.

title: Update a tickers_catalog Object — update_tickers_catalog
text: new tickers_catalog S4 object combining old_tickers_catalog new_tickers_catalog: Renamed tickers keep perm_id pre-change ticker (looked full ticker-change history, just current call's ticker_changes). Genuinely new tickers keep hash-based perm_id assigned create_tickers_catalog(). rename boundary, tickers_last_quote old ticker tickers_first_quote new ticker set change_date. Pre-rename ticker rows retained old = TRUE listed = delisted = untraded = FALSE, history never dropped. current_date taken new_tickers_catalog; meta_dataframe_name n_days_tolerance taken old_tickers_catalog. ticker_change_history accumulates ticker_changes across calls.

title: Update a tickers_catalog Object — update_tickers_catalog
text: update proceeds three stages: Validation ticker_changes structure/types/uniqueness, partition newly added tickers IPOs vs. renames, classification transitions, date consistency two catalogs. perm_id reassignment, inheriting predecessor's perm_id renamed tickers. Recombination, re-appending old (pre-rename) rows merging ticker_change_history. Validation failures (stop()) include: malformed ticker_changes (missing columns, wrong types, NAs, duplicates); newly added tickers decomposed IPOs renamed old tickers; delisted ticker renamed, becoming listed/untraded; untraded ticker becoming listed (vice versa), without rename; tickers_first_quote/ tickers_last_quote mismatch tickers common catalogs (delisted tickers' tickers_last_quote must change); IPO's tickers_first_quote earlier old_tickers_catalog@current_date; new_tickers_catalog's maximum tickers_last_quote exceeding old catalog's; new_tickers_catalog@current_date exactly one month old_tickers_catalog@current_date. mismatched n_days_tolerance catalogs produces warning() rather stop().

title: Validate Liquidity Constraint Policy — validate_liquidity_constraint_policy
text: policy provided list may contain two elements: liquidity_floor_rule (Optional) character string indicating liquidity floor. Must one "micro_caps", "small_caps", "mid_caps", "large_caps", "mega_caps". liquidity_cap_rules (Optional) named numeric vector containing liquidity caps. names must valid liquidity categories (see ), must duplicated names, numeric values must lie interval (0, 1]. liquidity_floor_rule provided, liquidity cap can set category less liquid floor. Moreover, monotonicity enforced: two categories, one category less liquid another, cap must exceed liquid category.

title: Validate portfolio construction methods and parameters — validate_port_construction_methods
text: port_construction_method Character. One "ew","sw","cw","cs","rp","hrp","mvo","mmaf". micro_port_construction_method Character NULL. Micro-level method (port_construction_method == "mmaf"). macro_port_construction_method Character NULL. Macro-level method (port_construction_method == "mmaf"). opt_method, random_ports_method, n_random_ports, opt_objective, n_resamples, exp_ret_score_jitter,cov_eigval_jitter MVO (micro) controls; see function body constraints. macro_opt_method, macro_random_ports_method, macro_n_random_ports, macro_opt_objective, macro_n_resamples,macro_exp_ret_score_jitter,macro_cov_eigval_jitter MVO (macro) controls; see constraints. exp_ret_score_tilt, exp_ret_score_tilt_eta RP/HRP (micro) tilt config; see constraints. macro_exp_ret_score_tilt, macro_exp_ret_score_tilt_eta RP/HRP (macro) tilt config; see constraints. mmaf_group_col Character NULL. Grouping column name MMAF. stock_groups_m_df data.frame NULL. Must contain mmaf_group_col MMAF. mmaf_method Character NULL. One "bottom_up","top_down" MMAF. top_down_proxy_port_method Character NULL. mmaf_method == "top_down", one "ew","sw","cs","rp","hrp". ridge_pen, macro_ridge_pen Numeric NULL. Non-negative ridge penalties (micro/macro). Require MVO valid target_port_m_df. target_port_m_df data.frame/meta_dataframe NULL. Target weights ridge penalty (NAs; column 4 must target_weights). signals_m_df data.frame. Used verify ID coverage vs target_port_m_df. dates_m_vector Date vector. Used initial_buffer_period filter signals_m_df. initial_buffer_period Integer index dates_m_vector.
